title: SEC1: Document PaymentAction wire format breaking change
description: The change from amount:String to amount_zatoshi:u64 in PaymentAction is a wire format breaking change — old and new clients cannot interoperate. This is not documented anywhere. DESIGN.md should note that the PaymentAction wire format changed and old clients are incompatible. A comment in messages.rs at the PaymentAction variants would also help future maintainers.
close_reason: all three fixes applied and confirmed clean by clippy+tests
